name: BMW 3 Series 320i
description: Elegant BMW 3 Series 320i with a 2.0L turbocharged engine delivering exceptional performance. Features include a 12.3-inch digital cockpit wireless Apple CarPlay ambient lighting and sport seats. Dealer maintained with complete service history. Ideal for executives seeking a premium daily drive.

name: Nissan Patrol Platinum
description: Commanding Nissan Patrol Platinum with a 5.6L V8 engine producing 400 horsepower. This full-size SUV features a 13-inch touchscreen Bose sound system hydraulic body motion control and quilted leather seats. Perfect for large families and off-road adventures with unmatched luxury.

name: Kia Picanto GT Line
description: Sporty and fuel-efficient Kia Picanto GT Line in showroom condition. Equipped with a 1.2L engine digital instrument cluster rear parking sensors and a 8-inch infotainment system. Ideal for city commuters looking for style and practicality in a compact package.

name: Toyota Land Cruiser ZX
description: Prestigious Toyota Land Cruiser ZX with a 4.5L twin-turbo diesel V8 engine. Offers 8-seater capacity with a multi-terrain select system 9-inch touchscreen Kinetic Dynamic Suspension and premium leather interior. A legendary off-roader that excels on any terrain.

name: Hyundai Elantra GLS
description: Sleek and modern Hyundai Elantra GLS featuring a 1.6L MPI engine with smart cruise control. Loaded with a 10.25-inch navigation display wireless charging BlueLink connectivity and a Bose premium sound system. Single owner excellent condition with full dealership service record.

name: Volkswagen Polo Highline
description: Refined Volkswagen Polo Highline with a 1.0L TSI turbocharged engine offering spirited performance. Features include a composition colour touchscreen front parking sensors automatic air conditioning and multifunction steering wheel. European build quality with low running costs.

name: Honda Vezel Hybrid
description: Efficient and stylish Honda Vezel Hybrid crossover with a 1.5L hybrid powertrain delivering outstanding fuel economy. Equipped with a floating touchscreen LaneWatch camera electric parking brake and Honda Sensing suite. Well-maintained by a single professional owner.

name: Changan Alsvin Lumiere
description: Brand new condition Changan Alsvin Lumiere featuring a 1.5L DVVT engine with stylish split headlamp design. Comes with a 10.1-inch HD touchscreen reverse camera keyless entry push start and dual front airbags. Great value compact sedan for daily city use.

name: Porsche Cayenne S
description: Exhilarating Porsche Cayenne S with a 2.9L bi-turbo V6 engine producing 440 horsepower. This premium SUV boasts air suspension PDCC sport Porsche Communication Management 18-way adaptive sports seats and a panoramic roof system. Serviced exclusively at authorized Porsche centre.

name: MG 5 Essence
description: Feature-rich MG 5 Essence with a 1.5L turbocharged engine and sport-tuned suspension. Loaded with a 10.1-inch floating touchscreen 360-degree camera ADAS safety suite ventilated front seats and a panoramic sunroof. Complete service history available with authorized dealer stamps.
